name: Double Diamond
description: Problem space (Discover diverge -> Define converge) then solution space (Develop diverge -> Deliver converge). Frame an ambiguous problem and take it to a buildable solution.
when_to_use: When you have a 'How Might We' question and want a rigorous problem framing plus a tested, buildable solution spec.

phases.name: Discover
phases.intent: Surface the real, lived pains broadly across personas and angles. No solutions yet. Anti-steering is strongest here.

phases.name: Define
phases.intent: Cluster the breadth into ONE core problem and a sharp Point-of-View (who + needs what + surprising insight). Frame the next How-Might-We.

phases.name: Develop
phases.intent: Generate multiple solution candidates from the POV and build at least one real, minimal prototype to test.

phases.name: Deliver
phases.intent: Have personas actually USE the prototype(s), then converge to a buildable specification (must-haves, who-for, validated solves, open risks).
